title: The Final Voice (Part 4 of the LOUD Series)
speaker: Joy Cronje
summary: The sermon reveals that you are the final voice in someone's life, and what comes out of your mouth matters to those around you. Ultimately, God's voice should be your final voice, guiding all your movements, speech, and actions, just as the Israelites moved only at the mouth of the Lord.
quotes: You are the final voice in someone's life.
When I open my mouth, whose voice is coming out?
We will not move. We will not speak. We will not act until we have heard from the mouth of God.
